settings.custom_liquid:
ZUVE Nail Size Guide

Getting the right size is the most important step for a natural-looking result. Every ZUVE set includes 30 nails in 15 different sizes — so every finger gets a perfect fit.

How to Find Your Size

Method 1: Try Each Nail

Hold each nail size over your nail (without sticking). The nail should cover your nail plate from one side wall to the other — with no gaps at the sides and no overlap onto the skin.

Method 2: Measure Your Nail

Using a soft measuring tape or a piece of string, measure the width of each nail at its widest point. Note the measurement in mm for each finger. Use this to select your size from the chart below.

Between Sizes? Go Larger

If you're between two sizes, always choose the larger size. You can gently file the side edges for a perfect custom fit. Going too small leaves gaps at the sides and looks unnatural.

ZUVE Size Chart

Size Number Nail Width (approx.) Typically Fits
018–19 mmThumb (wide)
116–17 mmThumb (medium)
215–16 mmIndex / Thumb
314–15 mmIndex finger
413–14 mmMiddle finger
512–13 mmMiddle / Ring
611–12 mmRing finger
710–11 mmRing / Pinky
8–148–10 mmPinky & narrow fingers

What's Included in Every ZUVE Set

30 nails total · 15 different sizes · 2 nails per size · Adhesive tabs · Nail prep pad · Nail file · Storage case
